data.title: XRP nears crucial $2.30 support, trades at $2.31 with a 1.9% drop. Technical signals suggest possible reversal.
data.description: XRP, the digital currency of Ripple, is currently trading at $2.31 after experiencing a 1.9% decrease. This decline comes as the price of XRP nears important technical support levels, coinciding with a general weakness in the cryptocurrency market and oversold conditions according to the Relative Strength Index (RSI).

data.title: Founder Courtney Lang to emcee MHA Awards Luncheon in DC on Oct 17, 2025, honoring mental health advocates. 🏆
data.description: Today, on October 17, 2025, mental health advocate and policy strategist Courtney Lang, JD, is set to host the Awards Luncheon at the Mental Health America (MHA) Conference in Washington. The event will take place at 11:15 AM and will honor various individuals within the mental health community.

data.title: ETH price tests support near $3,435, trades at $3,822.54 down 2.15%, amid technical correction below $3,900.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Ethereum is currently trading at $3,822.54, showing a decrease of 2.15% in value. This decline comes as the price of ETH is testing a crucial support level around $3,435, following a technical correction from its peak in October.

data.title: ETH price drops to $3,822.54 (-2.15%) testing key support at $3,435, amid technical correction from October's highs.
